title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Rackspace India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Rackspace India
jsonLd.description:
Rackspace India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Jabalpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Rackspace India:
Rackspace India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rackspace India!
